title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Xpressbees South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Supply Chain Manager looking for your next big career move? Xpressbees South Asia Partners in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Xpressbees South Asia Partners:
Xpressbees South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees South Asia Partners!
